name: Garlic Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups nonfat plain yogurt, strained overnight
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap the garlic head in aluminum foil and bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 35 minutes.
2. Remove the foil and press the baked garlic until all the flesh squeezes out. You should have 1 heaping tablespoon of puree.
3. Blend the garlic, yogurt, parsley, pepper, and salt together.
CAUTION: If you overstir strained yogurt, it will become thin.
